source: Evidentia-authored (v0.9.3 P2.2) — initial concordance between NIST AI RMF subcategories and ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Annex A controls. Per-mapping confidence field surfaces low-confidence entries for SME review. Refinements via community PR.
v0_9_3_note: Initial v0.9.3 ship: ~25 high-confidence mappings. ISO 42001:2023 Annex A control text is copyrighted (ISO/IEC); we cite IDs only. Operators with ISO licensing should verify mapping intent against the authoritative control text.

confidence_rubric.high: Direct semantic match: AI RMF subcategory restates an ISO 42001 Annex A control objective.
confidence_rubric.medium: Overlapping intent with partial scope; SME review recommended.
confidence_rubric.low: Related domain but ambiguous; SME review strongly recommended.

mappings.source_control_title: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood
mappings.notes: Leadership commitment includes regulatory compliance scope.

mappings.source_control_title: Trustworthy AI characteristics integrated into policies
mappings.notes: AI policy + commitment to AI principles.

mappings.source_control_title: Roles, responsibilities, lines of communication documented
mappings.notes: Operational planning includes role + responsibility definition.

mappings.source_control_title: Decision-making processes consider AI risk tolerances
mappings.notes: AI objectives + planning consider risk appetite.
Context establishment includes cultural posture.
Interested-party identification covers external stakeholders.
Third-party + supplier relationships in AI context.
Direct mapping: 'understand the organization and its context'.
AI system impact assessment documents task scope.

mappings.source_control_title: AI system knowledge limits and assumptions
mappings.notes: Communication of AI system characteristics to users.
Performance evaluation = TEVV.
Impact assessment includes benefit/cost identification.
Risk management activities planned at leadership level.

mappings.source_control_title: Likelihood and impact of AI risks assessed
mappings.notes: AI risk assessment with likelihood + impact dimensions.

mappings.source_control_title: Approaches and metrics for risk measurement
mappings.notes: Monitoring, measurement, analysis, evaluation.

mappings.source_control_title: Test sets, metrics, details of evaluation
mappings.notes: Data management covers training/test/validation datasets.

mappings.source_control_title: AI system performance is regularly evaluated
mappings.notes: Performance evaluation.
Monitoring covers trustworthy characteristic metrics.
Operational controls cover measurement tracking.
AI risk treatment with cost-benefit consideration.
Resources clause.

mappings.source_control_title: Risks and benefits documented and monitored
mappings.notes: Monitoring + measurement documents ongoing risk posture.

mappings.source_control_title: Plans for incidents and continuous improvement
mappings.notes: Incident response + continual improvement.
